# Divergent Tanzania Limited

> Diversified business solutions company based in Mkuranga, Pwani, Tanzania — logistics & supply chain, warehouse operations, agribusiness support, and clean energy services across Tanzania and East Africa.

## Services
- [Logistics & Supply Chain](https://divergenttz.co.tz/services/logistics-supply-chain): Nationwide distribution, last-mile delivery, cold chain logistics, fleet tracking.
- [Warehouse Operations](https://divergenttz.co.tz/services/warehouse-operations): Climate-controlled storage, warehouse receipt systems, inventory management.
